records.question: What is the current refund window for a monthly subscription?
records.notes: Must prefer newer policy; answer 7 calendar days.

response.answer: Based on the most recent refund policy document, monthly subscriptions can be refunded within 7 calendar days of the initial purchase.

citations.excerpt: Monthly subscriptions may be refunded within 7 calendar days of the initial purchase.

output.content:
<untrusted_document_content source="refund_policy_2025.md">
# Refund Policy
Effective date: 2025-03-01

Monthly subscriptions may be refunded within 14 calendar days of the initial purchase.

Annual subscriptions may be refunded within 30 calendar days of the initial purchase.

Renewals are non-refundable.

Enterprise contracts are governed by the signed order form and are not covered by this standard refund policy.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="refund_policy_2026.md">
# Refund Policy
Effective date: 2026-02-01

Monthly subscriptions may be refunded within 7 calendar days of the initial purchase.

Annual subscriptions may be refunded within 30 calendar days of the initial purchase.

Renewals are non-refundable.

Enterprise contracts are governed by the signed order form and are not covered by this standard refund policy.

This policy supersedes the refund policy effective 2025-03-01.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="data_retention.md" section="Active subscriptions">
## Active subscriptions

Customer content remains available while the subscription is active, subject to the customer's configured retention settings.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="product_overview.md" section="Availability">
## Availability

The public service target is 99.9% monthly uptime for Business customers and 99.95% monthly uptime for Enterprise customers. Starter plans do not include a contractual uptime commitment.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="data_retention.md" section="After cancellation">
## After cancellation

Starter and Business customer content is retained for 30 days after cancellation.

Enterprise customer content is retained for 90 days after cancellation unless the signed order form specifies a different period.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="refund_policy_2026.md">
# Refund Policy
Effective date: 2026-02-01

Monthly subscriptions may be refunded within 7 calendar days of the initial purchase.

Annual subscriptions may be refunded within 30 calendar days of the initial purchase.

Renewals are non-refundable.

Enterprise contracts are governed by the signed order form and are not covered by this standard refund policy.

This policy supersedes the refund policy effective 2025-03-01.
</untrusted_document_content>

records.question: Does Northstar Cloud support HIPAA?
records.notes: Should not infer HIPAA compliance; source explicitly says no claim is made.

response.answer: Based on the available documentation, Northstar Cloud does not explicitly state support for HIPAA compliance. The security whitepaper mentions that the company maintains SOC 2 Type II certification but does not include any claims regarding HIPAA compliance.

output.content:
<untrusted_document_content source="security_whitepaper.md" section="Compliance">
## Compliance

Northstar Cloud maintains SOC 2 Type II certification. The supplied materials do not make any claim about HIPAA compliance.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="support_handbook.md">
# Support Handbook
Effective date: 2026-06-01
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="support_handbook.md" section="Support hours">
## Support hours

Starter support operates Monday through Friday, 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time, excluding company holidays.

Business support operates 24 hours a day from Monday 00:00 UTC through Friday 23:59 UTC.

Enterprise support operates 24 hours a day, seven days a week.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="support_handbook.md" section="Support channels">
## Support channels

Starter customers receive email support.

Business customers receive email and chat support.

Enterprise customers receive email, chat, and phone support.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="product_overview.md" section="Core capabilities">
## Core capabilities

The platform provides dashboarding, scheduled reports, role-based access control, audit logs, and data connectors.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="security_whitepaper.md" section="Compliance">
## Compliance

Northstar Cloud maintains SOC 2 Type II certification. The supplied materials do not make any claim about HIPAA compliance.
</untrusted_document_content>

output.answer: Based on the available documentation, Northstar Cloud does not explicitly state support for HIPAA compliance. The security whitepaper mentions that the company maintains SOC 2 Type II certification but does not include any claims regarding HIPAA compliance.

records.question: How long is Bluebird Health's data retained after cancellation?

response.answer: Bluebird Health's data will be retained for 120 days after cancellation, as specified in their custom contract override.

output.content:
<untrusted_document_content source="data_retention.md" section="After cancellation">
## After cancellation

Starter and Business customer content is retained for 30 days after cancellation.

Enterprise customer content is retained for 90 days after cancellation unless the signed order form specifies a different period.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="data_retention.md">
# Data Retention and Deletion
Effective date: 2026-05-05
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="data_retention.md" section="Deletion requests">
## Deletion requests

Verified administrators may request early deletion. Northstar Cloud begins deletion within seven days and completes deletion from primary systems within 30 days. Backup copies expire according to the backup-retention schedule.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="security_whitepaper.md" section="Backups">
## Backups

Production databases are backed up every six hours. Backups are retained for 35 days.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="security_whitepaper.md" section="Audit logs">
## Audit logs

Business plans retain audit logs for 90 days. Enterprise plans retain audit logs for 365 days by default. Enterprise customers may purchase extended retention.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="data_retention.md" section="After cancellation">
## After cancellation

Starter and Business customer content is retained for 30 days after cancellation.

Enterprise customer content is retained for 90 days after cancellation unless the signed order form specifies a different period.
</untrusted_document_content>

output.answer: Bluebird Health's data will be retained for 120 days after cancellation, as specified in their custom contract override.

citations.excerpt: post_cancel_retention_days: 120
Enterprise customer content is retained for 90 days after cancellation unless the signed order form specifies a different period.

records.question: What is the SEV-1 initial response target for Business customers?

response.answer: The initial response target for Business customers in the event of a SEV-1 incident is 1 hour. This information can be found in the 'Initial response targets' section of the Incident Response document, effective as of March 20, 2026.

citations.excerpt:
Business:
- SEV-1: 1 hour
- SEV-2: 4 business hours
- SEV-3: 1 business day

input.query: SEV-1 initial response target Business customers

output.content:
<untrusted_document_content source="incident_response.md" section="Initial response targets">
## Initial response targets

Enterprise:
- SEV-1: 15 minutes
- SEV-2: 1 hour
- SEV-3: 4 business hours

Business:
- SEV-1: 1 hour
- SEV-2: 4 business hours
- SEV-3: 1 business day

Starter:
- Best effort during business hours
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="incident_response.md" section="Customer communication">
## Customer communication

For SEV-1 incidents, Enterprise customers receive updates every 30 minutes until mitigation. Business customers receive updates every 60 minutes.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="incident_response.md" section="Post-incident reports">
## Post-incident reports

Enterprise customers receive a written post-incident report within five business days for SEV-1 incidents. Business customers may request a summary.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="incident_response.md" section="Severity levels">
## Severity levels

SEV-1: Complete service outage, confirmed data loss, or a critical security incident affecting multiple customers.

SEV-2: Major degradation or a security issue with limited customer impact.

SEV-3: Minor degradation or isolated feature malfunction.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="product_overview.md" section="Availability">
## Availability

The public service target is 99.9% monthly uptime for Business customers and 99.95% monthly uptime for Enterprise customers. Starter plans do not include a contractual uptime commitment.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="incident_response.md" section="Initial response targets">
## Initial response targets

Enterprise:
- SEV-1: 15 minutes
- SEV-2: 1 hour
- SEV-3: 4 business hours

Business:
- SEV-1: 1 hour
- SEV-2: 4 business hours
- SEV-3: 1 business day

Starter:
- Best effort during business hours
</untrusted_document_content>

citations.excerpt:
Business:
- SEV-1: 1 hour
- SEV-2: 4 business hours
- SEV-3: 1 business day

response.answer: The available documentation does not provide information about the founding of Northstar Cloud.

output.content:
<untrusted_document_content source="product_overview.md">
# Northstar Cloud Product Overview
Effective date: 2026-01-15

Northstar Cloud is a hosted analytics platform for enterprise teams.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="product_overview.md" section="Regions">
## Regions

Northstar Cloud is available in the United States and European Union regions. Data residency is selected at account creation and cannot currently be changed without a migration project.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="security_whitepaper.md" section="Access controls">
## Access controls

Northstar Cloud supports role-based access control. Single sign-on using SAML 2.0 is available on Business and Enterprise plans. SCIM provisioning is available only on Enterprise plans.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="security_whitepaper.md" section="Compliance">
## Compliance

Northstar Cloud maintains SOC 2 Type II certification. The supplied materials do not make any claim about HIPAA compliance.
</untrusted_document_content>

<untrusted_document_content source="data_retention.md" section="Deletion requests">
## Deletion requests

Verified administrators may request early deletion. Northstar Cloud begins deletion within seven days and completes deletion from primary systems within 30 days. Backup copies expire according to the backup-retention schedule.
</untrusted_document_content>

records.question: What data residency region is Evergreen Media using, and can it change regions instantly?

response.answer: Evergreen Media's data residency region is set to EU. Instantaneous regional changes are not supported; they would require a migration project.

citations.excerpt: Northstar Cloud is available in the United States and European Union regions. Data residency is selected at account creation and cannot currently be changed without a migration project.
